name: NAUS
short_description: NAUS is a thrilling 2D action roguelike that takes you deep into a dark dungeon for deadly battles against hordes of monsters and exciting adventures. Explore dark corridors and caves, where every step can be a challenge.
detailed_description:
NAUS is a thrilling 2D action roguelike that takes you deep into a dark dungeon for deadly battles against hordes of monsters and exciting adventures. Explore dark corridors and caves, where every step can be a challenge. Your task is to collect rare crystals and magical ores that will help you fight the dangers of the dungeon. Prepare for incredible battles, choose your weapons to face increasingly powerful and terrifying enemies.

The game offers you an exciting mixture of dynamic gameplay, strategic thinking and constant preparation for unpredictable situations. Control your hero, collect rare resources, explore the nooks and crannies of the dungeon and become a real hero in the fight against evil.
